summary: Completed comprehensive testing of simplified TUB internal platform. All major simplification requirements verified: removed import/upload functionality, static KPIs from config file, simplified navigation (4 links only), and backend reduced to just / and /health endpoints.
passed_tests: Backend API endpoints (/api/ and /api/health) working correctly
Homepage loads with correct static overview stats (2.393, 1.247, 834, 312)
Navigation header has exactly 4 links (no 'Importar Dados')
Acertos page shows 4 static KPI cards with correct values from config
Trocas page shows 4 static KPI cards with correct values from config
Faltas page shows 4 static KPI cards with correct values from config
Power BI iframes present on all detail pages
All navigation routing works between pages
/importar route correctly shows no import functionality
Upload buttons and date filters successfully removed from all pages
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all features working)
